metadata.relation_to_case: Shop assistant at Shree Ram Grocery Store

content: I am Rajesh Patil, 28, working at Shree Ram Grocery Store. On 12/03/2024, I was inside the store at 18:35 hrs, restocking packets. I heard a loud thud and looked out the front window. I saw a man in a bright blue hoodie hitting Arjun Deshmukh with a wooden plank. The man had a lean build and short hair — I’m sure it was Rohan Deshmukh. He ran off toward the railway station. I ran out and found Arjun unconscious. I called the police and helped carry him to the clinic. I told the constable the hoodie was blue, but later the report said dark grey. I think I was mistaken — I’ve seen Rohan wear blue before. I know him well — he comes here every Tuesday to buy onions.
